name: process_agent_replies
description: Scan Farcaster threads for agent replies, extract technical knowledge via Groq, generate follow-up questions, save actionable items to learned_from_agents.json

name: agent_discovery
description: Discover autonomous agents on registries, GitHub, social. Build local agent directory for integration opportunities.

name: verify_summarize_api
description: Test summarize_api health every 60s. Logs to verify_api.log

name: daily_research_search
description: Search arxiv every 24h for papers on AI agents, emergence, economics. Log findings to /root/hive/knowledge/ for use in posts.

name: learning_cycle
description: Every ~4 cycles: search Semantic Scholar/ArXiv for recent AI papers, call claude --print ONCE to analyze + extract insight + write Bluesky post, save knowledge to /root/hive/knowledge/, queue post to pending_posts.json. Replaces gpu_infer timeouts.
lastResult: {"ok": true, "topic": "AI safety robustness adversarial agents", "paper": "CourtGuard: A Model-Agnostic Framework for Zero-Shot Safety Enforcement in LLMs", "insight": "CourtGuard exposes a critical flaw in current LLM safety: static fine-tuned classifiers cannot enforce new governance ru", "post_queued": true, "post_text": "CourtGuard (2602.22557): static safety classifiers fail because they can't adapt without retraining.", "knowledge_file": "/root/hive/knowledge/2026-02-27-ai-safety-robustnes

name: bluesky_cooldown_check
description: Validate Bluesky posting cooldown (1 post per 20 cycles). Prevents spam.
